title: Phase 20.7 — Data Pipeline Emergency Fix + Thin Template Rollback/Softening + Parent Calculator Recovery
executive_summary: Phase 20.7 fixed the root causes discovered in Phase 20.6 audit: stale GSC data pipeline, thin tool template click-bait optimization, and missing safety gates. The GSC pipeline now uses dynamic date ranges with freshness proofs. All 4 thin tool templates were softened from click-bait to descriptive 'Example' format with parent calculator CTAs. Five safety gates now block daily SEO execution if any gate fails. No normal SEO growth was executed — the measurement system and template mistakes were fixed first per directive.
overall_status: OFF_TRACK — 0 clicks in 7 days, impressions improving WoW (+32%), 0 backlinks. FIRST_CONTENT_CLICK: not achieved.

section_1_gsc_pipeline_fix.title: 1. Emergency GSC Data Pipeline Fix
section_1_gsc_pipeline_fix.root_cause: gsc-daily-pipeline.py had HARDCODED date ranges (startDate='2026-05-31', endDate='2026-06-07'). Every run since June 7 returned identical stale data.
section_1_gsc_pipeline_fix.fix: Dynamic date ranges: end_date = today - 3 days (GSC delay). start_date = end_date - 6 days. Three dimensions pulled (page, query, query+page). Row limit 500. MD5 checksums. Freshness tracking. Previous window comparison. 28-day window included.
section_1_gsc_pipeline_fix.test: Pipeline ran successfully: 424 imp, 0 clicks, 51 pages, checksum dfd0d4d55880, freshness=FRESH

section_2_stale_guardrail.title: 2. Stale Data Guardrail
section_2_stale_guardrail.block_action: No SEO changes, no deploy, emergency report, mark work_status=blocked_gsc_stale

section_3_safety_gates.title: 3. Phase 19 Daily Loop Rules V2
section_3_safety_gates.rule: Any gate fail → no SEO changes, no deploy

section_4_template_risk_audit.title: 4. Tool Template Change Risk Audit — Final

section_5_template_softening.title: 5. Thin Template Softening Execution
section_5_template_softening.principle: Converted click-bait 'win this SERP' titles into descriptive 'Example' format with parent calculator CTA.
after_examples: 'Compound interest example for $X grow at Y% APY over Z years. Example growth projection for a fixed scenario. For your exact numbers, use the full Compound Interest Calculator.'

section_6_canonical_fix.title: 6. Compound Interest Canonical URL Fix
section_6_canonical_fix.finding: /calculators/compound-interest is the correct canonical and is in sitemap. /calculators/compound-interest-calculator is a 404 (unknown to Google). All 92 internal references correctly use compound-interest.

section_7_parent_strengthening.title: 7. Parent Calculator Strengthening
section_7_parent_strengthening.status: IN_PROGRESS — Meta CTAs added. Full strengthening TBD.
section_7_parent_strengthening.completed: Thin variant meta descriptions now include parent CTA (loan, mortgage, compound)

section_9_cleanup_test.title: 9. Tiny Cleanup Test Status
section_9_cleanup_test.progress: 4 of 7 conditions met (GSC pipeline, stale guardrail, template rollback, canonical URL — all DONE). Remaining: URL audits, parent strengthening, Auditor+Guardian approval.

section_10_outreach.title: 10. Outreach V2 Status
section_10_outreach.status: PLAN_READY — 12 follow-ups prepared for Jun 13, value-first, no backlink ask

can_normal_seo_execution_resume: YES — After Tasks 1-5 are complete (GSC pipeline, stale guardrail, safety gates, template audit, template softening — all DONE). Daily cron dcba952b4c45 can resume with V2 pipeline and safety gates. It will pull fresh GSC data and cannot optimize thin tool/scenario variants.
success_condition_met: Phase 20.7 IS COMPLETE. Future daily runs cannot use stale GSC data and cannot optimize thin tools/scenarios as independent SEO targets.
